name: North Vietnam at A Glance: Sapa & Halong Bay Package 5 days
highlights: Delve into the magnificent North Vietnam, which features stunning seascapes and captivating mountains.
Explore unique ethnic minority groups in Sapa, enjoy breathtaking scenery, and interact with hospitable locals.
Board an overnight cruise to see Halong Bay, one of the world's "natural wonders".

itinerary.title: Hanoi - Bus to Sapa
itinerary.description: Depart from Hanoi on a scenic bus ride to Sapa, a charming town nestled in the Hoang Lien Son mountain range. The journey passes through the countryside, rice fields, and misty valleys. Enjoy the changing landscapes as you leave the bustling capital behind and head towards the cooler mountain region. Upon arrival in Sapa, proceed to your hotel for check-in. Take a moment to relax and refresh after the journey

itinerary.title: Sapa Trekking - Y Linh Ho - Lao Chai - Ta Van Village
itinerary.description:
Distance & Est. time: Trekking 6 km

Morning

After breakfast, our local guide will pick you up at the hotel to begin your trekking adventure. Trek 6 km along trails that lead to Lao Chai village, a hidden gem in Muong Hoa Valley where you may interact with locals and discover more about the Black Hmong and Giay cultures. You can catch a glimpse of the untamed and picturesque Y Linh Ho village at the base of the slope which is approximately 3 km from here. Surrounded by lovely terraced fields that have been there for a very long time, the scenery of this place is absolutely breathtaking

itinerary.title: Trek to Local Villages - Cat Cat - Sin Chai - Hanoi
itinerary.description:
Distance & Est. time: Hiking 3 km

Morning

Before beginning our second day of trekking, enjoy a leisurely breakfast in the hotel's relaxed ambiance and go through the check-out process. The hiking trail is lighter today. Travel to Cat Cat village, which is about 3 km from the town, and see the magnificent waterfall and the hydroelectric power station that the French built while they were colonizing Vietnam. Afternoon

As you trek to Sin Chai village, the breathtaking views of Fansipan Mountain will astound you

itinerary.title: Hanoi - Halong Bay Overnight Cruise
itinerary.description:
Morning

Enjoy breakfast at the hotel and take in the pristine morning. Please finish checking out so that we can pick you up for the worldwide famous Halong Bay at approximately 08:00 - 08:30. It takes 2,5 hours on the highway to get to the cruise pier

As you arrive at the waiting area, process check in procedures. To begin your Halong Bay tour, transfer to a speedboat or tender. While you're on the tender, enjoy scenic islets on the green sea while the cruise manager gives you an overview of the bay and your route

itinerary.title: Halong Bay - Hanoi
itinerary.description:
Morning 

If you wake up before 06:00, you could join the Tai Chi class. Join this active session to relax and rejuvenate yourself while also taking in the clean, pure air of Halong Bay. After a light breakfast consisting of Vietnamese tea, coffee, and pastries, guests can explore Halong Bay with thrilling water sports including kayaking, caving, etc.. Return to the boat, get ready to check out, then have brunchas cruising past the stunning rock formations on your way to the port. After bidding farewell to each passenger, the captain and the cruise staff board the tender to arrive at the port

included: AC land transfer in Car/ Minivan.
Accommodation is shared in Twin/Double room with daily breakfast.
Halong Bay Cruise program shared in Twin/Double cabin as per tour.
Meals as stated in the itinerary (B: Breakfast; L: Lunch; D: Dinner)
Sharing luxury limousine Hanoi - Sapa - Hanoi
Shuttle bus Hanoi - Ha Long Bay - Hanoi
importantNotes: PROGRAMS & SCHEDULES SUBJECT TO CHANGE WITHOUT PRIOR NOTICE
